recommendations.title: Riddick

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Camille
recommendations.overview: A twisted honeymoon adventure about a young couple on their way to Niagara Falls.

recommendations.title: Night of the Dark Full Moon
recommendations.overview: A man investigates the grisly crimes that occurred in a former insane asylum, unsettling the locals who all seem to have something to hide.

recommendations.title: Solo
recommendations.overview: After falling off a cliff and suffering substantial injures, for 48 long hours a young surfer must face a merciless nature and his own physical and mental agony to try to survive.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.
